{{Quote|I just love a man in uniform!|Zeela Nall|<ref name="Lucky Stars">{{Tales|15|Lucky Stars}}</ref>}}
[[General/Legends|General]] [[Orma Hundeen]] along with '''Zeela Nall''', [[Nuri Pravada]], [[Sheyne Tyndos]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were on a mission on [[Elerion]] to recover the holocube map containing the location of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] main bases from [[Nescan Tal'yo]], [[Hermos (droid)|Hermos]] and [[Gogol (owner)|Gogol]].

Although appearing to be [[Human/Legends|Human]], her eyes had cat-like irises and were completely green-yellow.
